params.args: Encoded parameters provided at redemption time.
params.callData: The calldata for the target call.
params.delegationHash: Hash of the delegation being redeemed.
params.delegator: The account that created the delegation.
params.terms: Encoded parameters set at delegation creation time.

params.args: Encoded parameters provided at redemption time.
params.callData: The calldata for the target call.
params.delegationHash: Hash of the delegation being redeemed.
params.delegator: The account that created the delegation.
params.terms: Encoded parameters set at delegation creation time.

afterHook(bytes,bytes,bytes32,address,ad.notice: Called after the delegated action is executed.         MUST revert if post-execution state is invalid.         Not all enforcers need post-hooks — default is a no-op.

beforeHook(bytes,bytes,bytes32,address,a.notice: Called before the delegated action is executed.         MUST revert if the caveat is not satisfied.
